subject: Re: Booking link - Arcana Analytics
body:
Jordan Osei,

Great to hear from you. Here is a link to book a time:

https://cal.com/birkity-famsl2/intro-call-engineering-scaling?name=Jordan+Osei&email=jordan.osei%40sink.example.com&notes=Tenacious+can+augment+Arcana+Analytics%27+ML+engineering+team+to+accelerate+the+development+of+their+AI-first+credit+intelligence+layer.

Pick any slot that works -- looking forward to the conversation.

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
